debug_info.goal:
inst✝ : Arch
state : SystemState
reqType : BasicRequest
tId : ThreadId
prelimReq : Request := ⋯
previous : List Request := ⋯
removed : List Request := ⋯
occurrences : List Nat := ⋯
req : Request := ⋯
pairedRequest? : Option Request := ⋯
requests' : RequestArray := ⋯
orderConstraints' : OrderConstraints := ⋯
⊢ ∀ (id : RequestId), id ∈ List.map Request.id state.removed → id ∈ reqIds requests'

failed_attempts:
fun id hid =>
       have : ∀ i, i ∈ reqIds state.requests → i ∈ reqIds requests' := by
         intro i hi
         show i ∈ reqIds requests'
         revert hi
         change i ∈ reqIds state.requests → i ∈ reqIds (match pairedRequest? with | none => state.requests.insert req | some paired => (state.requests.insert { req with pairedRequest? := some paired.id }).insert { paired with pairedRequest? := some req.id })
         intro hi
         cases pairedRequest? with
         | none => exact reqIds_subset_insert _ _ _ hi
         | some paired => exact reqIds_subset_insert₂ _ _ _ _ hi
       this id (state.removedCoherent id hid)
